testcase.name: TC-TC-001 — Landing page loads without errors
TC-TC-002 — Page URL is correct (localhost:5173)
TC-TC-003 — Navbar is visible on landing page
TC-TC-004 — Login navigation link is present
TC-TC-005 — Sign Up navigation link is present
TC-TC-006 — Page renders without JS console errors (check title renders)
TC-TC-007 — FoodBridge branding / logo is visible
TC-TC-008 — Page has proper heading (h1 or h2)
TC-TC-009 — Clicking Login link navigates to /login
TC-TC-010 — Clicking Sign Up link navigates to /signup
TC-TC-011 — Page is responsive — viewport meta tag exists
TC-TC-012 — Landing page has at least one call-to-action button
TC-TC-013 — Signup page loads at /signup
TC-TC-014 — Signup form contains Username field
TC-TC-015 — Signup form contains Email field
TC-TC-016 — Signup form contains Password field
TC-TC-017 — Signup form contains Role selector
TC-TC-018 — Role dropdown has Donor, NGO, Volunteer options
TC-TC-019 — Submitting empty form shows validation
TC-TC-020 — Submitting with invalid email format shows validation
TC-TC-021 — Successful signup as Donor redirects to /login
TC-TC-022 — Successful signup as NGO redirects to /login
TC-TC-023 — Successful signup as Volunteer redirects to /login
TC-TC-024 — Duplicate email shows error message
TC-TC-025 — "Already have an account?" link navigates to /login
TC-TC-026 — Role pre-selected from query param ?role=ngo
TC-TC-027 — Role pre-selected from query param ?role=volunteer
TC-TC-028 — Login page loads at /login
TC-TC-029 — Login form has Email and Password fields
TC-TC-030 — Login form has a Submit button
TC-TC-031 — Empty form submission stays on /login
TC-TC-032 — Invalid credentials shows error message
TC-TC-033 — Donor login redirects to /donor dashboard
TC-TC-034 — NGO login redirects to /ngo dashboard
TC-TC-035 — Volunteer login redirects to /volunteer dashboard
TC-TC-036 — JWT token stored in localStorage after login
TC-TC-037 — User info stored in localStorage after login
TC-TC-038 — Logout clears localStorage and redirects
TC-TC-039 — Unauthenticated access to /donor redirects to /login
TC-TC-040 — "Don't have an account?" link navigates to /signup
TC-TC-041 — Password field masks characters (type=password)
TC-TC-042 — Donor dashboard loads at /donor
TC-TC-043 — Donor dashboard has a heading
TC-TC-044 — "Post New Donation" button is visible
TC-TC-045 — Clicking "Post New Donation" opens the donation form
TC-TC-046 — Donation form has Food Name field
TC-TC-047 — Donation form has Food Type dropdown
TC-TC-048 — Donation form has Address field
TC-TC-049 — Map picker is rendered in donation form
TC-TC-050 — Submitting empty donation form does not succeed
TC-TC-051 — Submitting valid donation form posts donation
TC-TC-052 — Donation history section is present
TC-TC-053 — Donation status pills are color coded
TC-TC-054 — Food type can be set to Non-Veg
TC-TC-055 — Food type can be set to Bakery
TC-TC-056 — Food type can be set to Cooked Meal
TC-TC-057 — Closing the donation form hides it
TC-TC-058 — Donor dashboard shows date of donations
TC-TC-059 — Donor cannot access NGO dashboard
TC-TC-060 — Donor cannot access Volunteer dashboard
TC-TC-061 — Page auto-polling updates donation list (polling is set up)
TC-TC-062 — NGO dashboard loads at /ngo
TC-TC-063 — NGO dashboard has a heading
TC-TC-064 — Leaflet map is rendered on NGO dashboard
TC-TC-065 — "Available Now" section is visible
TC-TC-066 — "Your Accepted" section is visible
TC-TC-067 — NGO can see pending donations in list
TC-TC-068 — "Claim Now" button is present for pending donations
TC-TC-069 — Clicking "Claim Now" on a donation sends accept request
TC-TC-070 — Map markers appear for pending donations
TC-TC-071 — Map popup shows food name and quantity on marker click
TC-TC-072 — NGO dashboard auto-refreshes every 5 seconds
TC-TC-073 — NGO cannot access Donor dashboard
TC-TC-074 — NGO cannot access Volunteer dashboard
TC-TC-075 — Sidebar donation count updates correctly
TC-TC-076 — NGO page has responsive sidebar layout
TC-TC-077 — Volunteer dashboard loads at /volunteer
TC-TC-078 — Volunteer dashboard has a heading
TC-TC-079 — "Available Tasks" section is visible
TC-TC-080 — "My Current Missions" section is visible
TC-TC-081 — "Start Delivery" button visible for available tasks
TC-TC-082 — Clicking "Start Delivery" claims a task
TC-TC-083 — "Mark as Picked" button appears for assigned tasks
TC-TC-084 — "Mark as Delivered" button appears after picking
TC-TC-085 — Completed tasks show COMPLETED badge
TC-TC-086 — Volunteer map renders for assigned tasks
TC-TC-087 — Volunteer dashboard auto-refreshes every 5 seconds
TC-TC-088 — Empty task list shows helpful message
TC-TC-089 — Volunteer cannot access Donor dashboard
TC-TC-090 — Volunteer cannot access NGO dashboard
TC-TC-091 — Task address displays location pin emoji
TC-TC-092 — Login: Email field is required (HTML5 validation)
TC-TC-093 — Login: Password field is required (HTML5 validation)
TC-TC-094 — Login: Invalid email format blocked
TC-TC-095 — Signup: All required fields must be filled
TC-TC-096 — Signup: Username is required
TC-TC-097 — Donation form: Food name is required
TC-TC-098 — Donation form: Quantity is required
TC-TC-099 — Donation form: Address is required
TC-TC-100 — Donation form: Expiry time is required
TC-TC-101 — Signup email field rejects non-email text
TC-TC-102 — Input fields clear properly on reset/navigation
TC-TC-103 — Form submit button is disabled during submission (no double submit)
TC-TC-104 — Unauthenticated /donor access redirects to /login
TC-TC-105 — Unauthenticated /ngo access redirects to /login
TC-TC-106 — Unauthenticated /volunteer access redirects to /login
TC-TC-107 — API /api/donations requires JWT token (401 without token)
TC-TC-108 — API /api/auth/login returns 401 for wrong credentials
TC-TC-109 — API /api/donations/1/accept returns 403 for donor role
TC-TC-110 — API /api/donations/1/assign returns 403 for ngo role
TC-TC-111 — Donor cannot POST to /api/donations with NGO token
TC-TC-112 — Tampered JWT token is rejected by API
TC-TC-113 — CORS headers present on API response
TC-TC-114 — App loads correctly at 1920x1080 (Full HD) resolution
TC-TC-115 — App loads correctly at 1366x768 (HD) resolution
TC-TC-116 — App loads correctly at 1280x800 (WXGA) resolution
TC-TC-117 — Viewport meta tag is present for mobile compatibility
TC-TC-118 — CSS stylesheet loads without 404 errors
TC-TC-119 — JavaScript loads and runs without fatal errors
TC-TC-120 — API base URL is reachable (CORS compatible)
TC-TC-121 — HTML5 doctype declared (standards mode)
TC-TC-122 — App uses UTF-8 charset encoding
TC-TC-123 — Navigation links work across page transitions
TC-TC-124 — Landing page loads within 10 seconds
TC-TC-125 — Login page loads within 5 seconds
TC-TC-126 — Signup page loads within 5 seconds
TC-TC-127 — API /api/auth/login responds within 5 seconds
TC-TC-128 — API /api/donations responds within 5 seconds
TC-TC-129 — API /api/auth/signup responds within 5 seconds
TC-TC-130 — Page navigation from / to /login is fast (< 3 seconds)
TC-TC-131 — Multiple rapid API requests do not crash the server
TC-TC-132 — App page title loads within 3 seconds of navigation
TC-TC-133 — API profile endpoint responds within 3 seconds
TC-TC-134 — POST /api/auth/signup — creates new user with 201
TC-TC-135 — POST /api/auth/signup — duplicate email returns 400
TC-TC-136 — POST /api/auth/login — valid credentials return 200 + JWT
TC-TC-137 — POST /api/auth/login — wrong password returns 401
TC-TC-138 — POST /api/auth/login — unknown email returns 401
TC-TC-139 — GET /api/auth/profile — valid token returns user object
TC-TC-140 — GET /api/auth/profile — no token returns 401
TC-TC-141 — POST /api/donations — donor creates donation returns 201
TC-TC-142 — POST /api/donations — NGO role returns 403
TC-TC-143 — POST /api/donations — volunteer role returns 403
TC-TC-144 — POST /api/donations — no token returns 401
TC-TC-145 — GET /api/donations — donor sees own donations list
TC-TC-146 — GET /api/donations — NGO sees pending donations
TC-TC-147 — GET /api/donations — volunteer sees accepted donations
TC-TC-148 — GET /api/donations — no token returns 401
TC-TC-149 — POST /api/donations/:id/accept — donor role returns 403
TC-TC-150 — POST /api/donations/:id/assign — NGO role returns 403
TC-TC-151 — POST /api/donations/:id/accept — NGO accepts pending donation
TC-TC-152 — POST /api/donations/:id/status — invalid status returns 400
TC-TC-153 — GET /api/donations returns JSON content-type
TC-TC-154 — All images have alt attributes on landing page
TC-TC-155 — Login form inputs have type attributes for keyboard access
TC-TC-156 — Submit buttons have meaningful text
TC-TC-157 — Page has a single h1 heading for screen readers
TC-TC-158 — Form labels are associated with inputs (login page)
TC-TC-159 — Signup form inputs have placeholder text
TC-TC-160 — Navigation links are keyboard accessible (href attribute)
TC-TC-161 — Buttons are identifiable (have text or aria-label)
TC-TC-162 — Color contrast — page has readable text (not transparent)
TC-TC-163 — Error messages are accessible (visible text, not just colors)
TC-TC-164 — Core: Landing page still loads after all previous tests
TC-TC-165 — Core: Login page still accessible and has email input
TC-TC-166 — Core: Signup page still accessible and has role selector
TC-TC-167 — Core: Donor login → /donor redirect still works
TC-TC-168 — Core: NGO login → /ngo redirect still works
TC-TC-169 — Core: Volunteer login → /volunteer redirect still works
TC-TC-170 — Core: Unauthenticated /donor still redirects to /login
TC-TC-171 — Core: JWT API auth still blocks requests without token
TC-TC-172 — Core: Role-based route still blocks wrong-role access
TC-TC-173 — Core: Logout still clears localStorage and redirects
TC-TC-174 — E2E: New user can sign up via web form (Donor)
TC-TC-175 — E2E: Donor logs in and lands on /donor dashboard
TC-TC-176 — E2E: Donor dashboard loads with heading and CTA button
TC-TC-177 — E2E: Donor creates a donation via API
TC-TC-178 — E2E: NGO sees the pending donation in API list
TC-TC-179 — E2E: NGO accepts a pending donation (API)
TC-TC-180 — E2E: Volunteer sees accepted donation (API)
TC-TC-181 — E2E: Volunteer assigns themselves to accepted donation (API)
TC-TC-182 — E2E: Volunteer marks donation as picked (API)
TC-TC-183 — E2E: NGO login → /ngo dashboard loads via UI
TC-TC-184 — E2E: Volunteer login → /volunteer dashboard loads via UI
TC-TC-185 — E2E: Logout removes token and blocks protected route
TC-TC-186 — E2E: API profile returns correct role for each user type
TC-TC-187 — E2E: Complete API flow — signup, login, create, list
TC-TC-188 — E2E: Full UI navigation flow — Home → Signup → Login → Dashboard
TC-TC-189 — A01: Unauthenticated GET /api/donations returns 401/422
TC-TC-190 — A01: Donor role cannot accept donations (403 RBAC check)
TC-TC-191 — A01: NGO role cannot create donations (403 RBAC check)
TC-TC-192 — A01: Volunteer cannot assign self to non-existent donation (403/400)
TC-TC-193 — A01: NGO cannot assign volunteer (403 RBAC)
TC-TC-194 — A02: JWT secret is not exposed in API response
TC-TC-195 — A02: Passwords are not returned in API responses
TC-TC-196 — A03: SQL injection in login email field returns 401 (not 500)
TC-TC-197 — A03: SQL injection in password field does not bypass auth
TC-TC-198 — A03: XSS payload in signup – server responds without hanging
TC-TC-199 — A03: HTML injection payload in donation address does not cause 500
TC-TC-200 — A04: API responds to malformed request without hanging
TC-TC-201 — A04: API does not accept donations with negative quantities gracefully
TC-TC-202 — A05: API returns proper HTTP status codes (not always 200)
TC-TC-203 — A05: API /api/auth/profile without token returns 401/422
TC-TC-204 — A05: CORS is enabled (server responds with CORS headers)
TC-TC-205 — A06: Server header validation
TC-TC-206 — A07: Tampered JWT (modified payload) is rejected by API
TC-TC-207 — A07: Empty Bearer token string is rejected by API
TC-TC-208 — A07: Malformed Authorization header is rejected
TC-TC-209 — A07: Brute-force – repeated wrong passwords all return 401
TC-TC-210 — A07: JWT token format has three parts (header.payload.signature)
TC-TC-211 — A08: API accepts JSON content-type only (rejects form-data for signup)
TC-TC-212 — A09: Failed login attempt returns structured JSON error
TC-TC-213 — A09: Unauthorized API access returns JSON error (not HTML)
TC-TC-214 — A10: SSRF – malicious URL in address field does not trigger server request
TC-TC-215 — Mass Assignment – extra fields in signup are ignored
TC-TC-216 — Parameter pollution – duplicate email params in login
TC-TC-217 — Oversized payload in login body does not crash server
TC-TC-218 — Unicode/null bytes in login do not crash server
TC-TC-219 — Signup with invalid role value is rejected or stored as-is (no privilege escalation)
TC-TC-220 — Full lifecycle with valid tokens – all role boundaries enforced
TC-221 — Landing page hero section has gradient background
TC-222 — Navbar hover effects are smooth
TC-223 — Footer is present on landing page
TC-224 — Footer contains contact/social links
TC-225 — Page scrolls smoothly without jank
TC-226 — Loading spinner appears during API calls
TC-227 — Error toast notifications dismiss automatically
TC-228 — Success toast appears after donation created
TC-229 — Mobile hamburger menu toggles navbar
TC-230 — Font rendering is consistent across pages
TC-231 — Donor can edit a pending donation
TC-232 — Donor can delete a pending donation
TC-233 — NGO search/filter donations by food type
TC-234 — NGO can view donor name in donation card
TC-235 — Volunteer can view pickup address on map
TC-236 — Volunteer delivery route shown on Leaflet map
TC-237 — Donor dashboard shows total donations count
TC-238 — NGO dashboard shows accepted count badge
TC-239 — Volunteer dashboard shows completed deliveries
TC-240 — Search bar filters donation list in real time
TC-241 — Pagination works for large donation lists
TC-242 — Donation card expiry countdown timer works
TC-243 — Expired donations are marked automatically
TC-244 — Donor profile page loads with correct info
TC-245 — NGO profile page shows organisation name
TC-246 — Volunteer profile page shows deliveries done
TC-247 — Password change flow works for all roles
TC-248 — Email change flow triggers re-verification
TC-249 — Notification bell shows unread count
TC-250 — Marking notification as read updates count
TC-251 — GET /api/auth/profile returns correct role
TC-252 — PUT /api/donations/:id updates food name
TC-253 — DELETE /api/donations/:id returns 200 or 204
TC-254 — GET /api/donations?status=pending filters correctly
TC-255 — GET /api/donations?status=accepted filters correctly
TC-256 — POST /api/donations/:id/pickup returns 200
TC-257 — POST /api/donations/:id/deliver returns 200
TC-258 — GET /api/stats returns dashboard statistics
TC-259 — GET /api/notifications returns array
TC-260 — PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read returns 200
TC-261 — POST /api/auth/change-password returns 200
TC-262 — GET /api/donations?page=2 returns next page
TC-263 — GET /api/donations includes location coordinates
TC-264 — POST /api/donations with future expiry accepted
TC-265 — POST /api/donations with past expiry rejected
TC-266 — Session token expires after 24 hours
TC-267 — Refresh token not exposed in response body
TC-268 — API rate limit returns 429 after 100 requests/min
TC-269 — HTTPS redirect from HTTP enforced in production
TC-270 — Secure cookie flag set on auth token cookie
TC-271 — HttpOnly flag set to prevent JS cookie access
TC-272 — Content-Security-Policy header present
TC-273 — X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff header present
TC-274 — X-Frame-Options: DENY prevents clickjacking
TC-275 — Referrer-Policy header is set correctly
TC-276 — API does not expose internal stack traces
TC-277 — Admin endpoint /api/admin requires admin role
TC-278 — DELETE /api/users/:id requires admin role
TC-279 — Role in JWT payload matches DB role
TC-280 — Expired JWT is rejected with 401
TC-281 — Donation food name max 200 chars validated
TC-282 — Donation quantity must be positive integer
TC-283 — Address field max 500 chars validated
TC-284 — Email normalised to lowercase before storage
TC-285 — Username must be 3-50 chars validated
TC-286 — Password must be minimum 6 chars validated
TC-287 — Phone number format validated on profile
TC-288 — Location lat/lng must be valid floats
TC-289 — Expiry time must be in future at submission
TC-290 — Duplicate username rejected on signup
TC-291 — App renders at 2560x1440 (QHD) resolution
TC-292 — App renders at 1024x768 (XGA) resolution
TC-293 — App renders at 768x1024 (tablet portrait)
TC-294 — Leaflet map loads on Firefox browser
TC-295 — Leaflet map loads on Edge browser
TC-296 — CSS grid layout works on Safari 16+
TC-297 — Flexbox layout works on mobile Chrome
TC-298 — SVG icons render correctly across browsers
TC-299 — Local storage works across page reloads
TC-300 — Web Workers supported (background polling)
TC-301 — First Contentful Paint (FCP) < 2 seconds
TC-302 — Time to Interactive (TTI) < 4 seconds
TC-303 — API response time p95 < 500ms under load
TC-304 — Concurrent 10 login requests succeed
TC-305 — Donation list with 1000 items renders < 3s
TC-306 — Map renders 500 markers within 2 seconds
TC-307 — Image assets lazy-loaded below the fold
TC-308 — JavaScript bundle size < 2MB
TC-309 — CSS bundle size < 500KB
TC-310 — API POST donation responds < 1 second
TC-311 — Tab order follows visual reading order
TC-312 — Focus indicator visible on all interactive elements
TC-313 — ARIA roles assigned to navigation landmarks
TC-314 — Screen reader announces form validation errors
TC-315 — Color is not the only means of conveying status
TC-316 — Buttons accessible via keyboard Enter key
TC-317 — Modal dialogs trap focus when open
TC-318 — Skip-to-main-content link available
TC-319 — Image alt text is descriptive (not empty)
TC-320 — Form error messages linked via aria-describedby
TC-321 — Signup → Login → Donate full cycle still works
TC-322 — NGO accept → Volunteer deliver full cycle works
TC-323 — Unauthenticated routes still redirect correctly
TC-324 — API JWT auth still required after code changes
TC-325 — Donation list still paginates correctly
TC-326 — Profile update persists across sessions
TC-327 — Logout still clears all auth data
TC-328 — Role-based redirection still enforced
TC-329 — Map markers re-render after data refresh
TC-330 — Form validation still blocks empty submission
TC-331 — E2E: Donor creates donation — NGO claims — Volunteer delivers
TC-332 — E2E: Multiple NGOs see same pending donation
TC-333 — E2E: Volunteer marks picked then delivered in sequence
TC-334 — E2E: Donor sees status change to 'picked' in real time
TC-335 — E2E: Donor sees status change to 'delivered'
TC-336 — E2E: New signup receives welcome notification
TC-337 — E2E: Expired donation removed from NGO list
TC-338 — E2E: Concurrent signups do not conflict on email
TC-339 — E2E: Admin can view all donations across users
TC-340 — E2E: Full cross-role notification flow verified
TC-341 — VUL: IDOR - User cannot access another user profile
TC-342 — VUL: IDOR - Donor cannot delete another donor's donation
TC-343 — VUL: Path traversal in file upload rejected
TC-344 — VUL: ReDoS payload in email field times out safely
TC-345 — VUL: CSV injection in address field neutralised
TC-346 — VUL: Open redirect via next param is blocked
TC-347 — VUL: Host header injection does not redirect
TC-348 — VUL: JWT algorithm confusion (RS256 vs HS256) rejected
TC-349 — VUL: NoSQL injection pattern in email rejected
TC-350 — VUL: HTTP verb tampering (OPTIONS as GET) handled
TC-351 — Load: 50 concurrent GET /api/donations requests succeed
TC-352 — Load: 50 concurrent POST /api/auth/login requests succeed
TC-353 — Load: Server recovers after 100 rapid signup attempts
TC-354 — Load: DB connection pool handles 20 concurrent queries
TC-355 — Load: API response time stays < 2s under 50 VUs
TC-356 — Load: No memory leak after 1000 sequential API calls
TC-357 — Load: Flask gunicorn serves 100 req/s without drop
TC-358 — Load: Frontend handles 200 donation cards without crash
TC-359 — Load: Leaflet map renders 100 markers under 3 seconds
TC-360 — Load: WebSocket polling stable over 60 seconds
TC-361 — Donation ID is unique across all records
TC-362 — Timestamps stored in UTC timezone
TC-363 — Soft-deleted donations not returned in list API
TC-364 — Concurrent claim by 2 NGOs only succeeds once
TC-365 — Donation status transitions are one-way (no rollback)
TC-366 — User ID foreign key enforced on donations table
TC-367 — Orphan donations cleaned on user deletion
TC-368 — Pagination offset consistent across requests
TC-369 — Search results consistent with DB state
TC-370 — API returns donations in created_at descending order
TC-371 — Push notification sent when donation is claimed
TC-372 — Push notification sent when volunteer assigned
TC-373 — Push notification sent on delivery completion
TC-374 — NGO receives alert for new available donation
TC-375 — Donor sees real-time status badge update
TC-376 — Volunteer receives task assignment notification
TC-377 — Unread notification count resets after reading
TC-378 — Notification payload contains donation ID
TC-379 — Polling interval of 5 seconds fires correctly
TC-380 — No duplicate notifications for same event
TC-381 — Leaflet map centres on user's city by default
TC-382 — Clicking map pin shows donation detail popup
TC-383 — Map zooms in on selected donation address
TC-384 — Geolocation permission prompt appears on first visit
TC-385 — Fallback location used when geolocation denied
TC-386 — Address auto-complete from coordinates works
TC-387 — Donation lat/lng stored with 6 decimal precision
TC-388 — Distance radius filter shows nearby donations
TC-389 — Multiple map layers toggle (satellite/street)
TC-390 — Map attribution links present and correct
TC-391 — API health endpoint /api/health returns 200
TC-392 — API version endpoint /api/version returns string
TC-393 — DB migration runs without error on fresh install
TC-394 — Environment variables loaded from .env correctly
TC-395 — Static assets served with correct Cache-Control
TC-396 — GZIP compression enabled for API responses
TC-397 — Error boundary catches React component crashes
TC-398 — 404 page shown for unknown routes
TC-399 — App metadata (title, description) set correctly
TC-400 — Full system smoke test — all services healthy
